name: Corn Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cream corn and whole kernel corn.
2. Add the sour cream, corn bread mix, melted margarine, and egg to the bowl.
3. Mix together until all ingredients are well incorporated.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
5. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 50 minutes, or until golden brown.
Note:
To reduce fat content, consider using fat-free sour cream or yogurt instead of regular sour cream, and use half a stick of margarine without any issues.
